text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"I have finished spectating the race, and have
now arrived at the nearest train station."
...Message sent.

text_block_list.name: International Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh, howdy, young lady! I'm a race reporter from
halfway 'cross the world! Mind if I get a few pics
of ya for the news?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have no plans at the moment... That is to say, "a
few pics" are okay.

text_block_list.name: International Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaw! These'll charm the papers back home!
Now you have a good one, Miss Mihono
Barbin! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...My name is Mihono Bourbon. It is spelled M-I-H-O-N-O B-O-U-R-B-O-N...

text_block_list.name: Platform Announcement
text_block_list.text:
The limited express train at platform one will be
departing shortly. Please stand behind the yellow
line.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analyzing situation. The reporter has boarded the
express train. Attempted correction failed. High
risk of my name being printed incorrectly
worldwide.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No other train will catch up in time. However, my
maximum speed exceeds that of the express.
Engaging run.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Correction complete. Fatigue from... unexpected exercise... detected.

Mihono Bourbon successfully points out the
mistake to the reporter, but now she's left utterly
exhausted.
